scripts.cms:docker: docker compose --profile cms up --build cms postgres
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:production: npm run build && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:staging: npm run build && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.staging.jsonc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:beta: npm run build && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --config wrangler.beta.jsonc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dry-run: npm run build && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.production.jsonc && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.staging.jsonc && npm exec -- wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.beta.jsonc
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm exec -- playwright test smoke.spec.ts sitemap.spec.ts navigation.spec.ts locale-autodetect.spec.ts --project=mobile-chrome
scripts.test:e2e:static: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:static-only
scripts.test:e2e:static-only: npm exec -- cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SERVE_STATIC=1 playwright test --project=mobile-chrome
scripts.test:e2e:install: npm exec -- playwright install chromium webkit
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.generate:assets: node scripts/generate-seo-assets.mjs && npm exec -- tsx scripts/generate-partner-data.ts
